tokens: Dave, when you get out to the (ALSEP) site, if you'll park down-Sun, we'll give you (the) Nav alignment when you get ready to go.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And did you copy "park down-Sun, give us the readings, and we'll align the Nav system when you press on towards Station 9."
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Dave, while you're driving, there, we're going to want you to take apart our core stems.
We'll have Jim pack them away in bag 2, which is under his seat, and then we'll do the Grand Prix photographs before we start driving off toward Station 9.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Pause) Wait a minute, Jimmy, let me...I'm going to back up a minute, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Kind of bogged down, isn't it?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I never saw it do that.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, it sure did, didn't it?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Get us going down-Sun here, so I can get those Nav readings.
(Pause) Still got to get in position, so I can do my tricks with the drill.
I'm push in the Nav circuit breaker.
And the Sun-shadow device is reading about one-half to the left, pitch is reading about 2 down, and roll...Jim, let go back there a minute...Roll is reading 2 left.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And if you could...(Let me) see, if I can...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: The object is to pull it out of the ground.
But I'm not sure we can do that without driving the drill.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Why not just drive it a little bit to break it loose.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Dave and Jim, this is Houston...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Lost under Joe) pulled it up yesterday.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Well, one of us get on one side...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...we're standing by for Rover powerdown and TV remote.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I didn't know you wanted the TV out here, too.
(Brief Static) Okay, down-Sun position is a bad one for the old Earth, but I'll do it on the AGC.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Oh; you ought to have it, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And by watching, maybe we can give you a few words of advice on this drill.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Dave, I'm thinking, maybe if you get on one side, I'll get on the other.
And maybe the two of us, by hooking an arm under that, can lift it out.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let me get down a little bit.
I'd like to get down and get a...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: But it's got a long way to go.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: But if we break it loose...1, 2, 3.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Joe, do you think...Looks to me like the only answer is going to be to back it off with the drill.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Except that treadle is going to go.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Don't want me to push it (meaning the treadle)?
Can I push it down and stand on it?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: The other problem is you got to break...I guess we could pull the whole...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Pull the whole thing out, huh?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...thing out and put it up on the vise and take it apart.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: That's about the only way we're going to do it.
Now we got to get it (perhaps the treadle) back down.
Let me turn it around and stand...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Can't stand clear of it, because...Should have left the treadle down there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Is the treadle on the ground now?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Hey, Joe; stand by, will you?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And if we get hung up, we'll let you know, and...We'll give you a progress.
If you keep asking questions, we got to stop what we're doing and talk to you.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I know you're anxious, but I guess we've had as many hacks at this drill (as anybody)...We'll ask you if we get hung up.
Little...(Laughing) Sucked me right back down.
That was a good idea, but that didn't work either.
(Laughing) What happens, Joe, is that, when I turn the drill on, the drill drills, like all drills should.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Put a little angle on it.
I was just going to suggest that.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think you broke it loose.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let's see, I've got a flag.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You might check your cuff gauge.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: See if we can get it to...(Responding to Joe) Yeah, I did; it's okay.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Let me get an elbow under it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I don't think it's worth doing, Jim.
We're not going to get it out.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I could put a lot of pressure on it this way.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: How many more (sections) do we have?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Now we're making a little progress.
Tell you what we're going to have to do is, I guess, break the drill, take the drill off, and then break the stems off one by one here and put the drill back on and pull it up again.
Are you guys that interested in this thing?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, how many inches has it moved upwards?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Well, we've got it up about 3 feet.
And I think we can do it piecemeal, if you're really that interested.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'll tell you, you sure invested an awful lot in this thing.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You don't think there is any chance of us pulling it all the way out, Dave?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: If we could just get our shoulder under that.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let me get down here, and get a shoulder under it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Wait, maybe you can get an arm under it, now.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I think I can grab it here.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let me help you down there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Don't auger it; just hold it now.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Both breathing heavily) (Pause) Why don't you go to
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, I just thought of that.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Joe, you having trouble with your TV?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And, Jim, why don't you take a breather and tip it up for us, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Nothing like a little PT (Physical Training) to start the day out.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Let me get underneath it here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Now if you'll close the gate.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Want me to put up the vise here?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Come and help me pull again, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'll get the caps for that.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Put all the stuff back here, if you can.
I can just work the problem right here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, all the gear's in bag 2.
And as you pull it apart, we want you to put the filled stems back into bag 2, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I'm going to need you to help me get this treadle up to the front, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Bring the whole bag back here, so I can work it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Just bring the bag back here, and I'll just work it like I usually do.
You can be doing something useful, instead of just standing.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, we need pictures of your beautiful trench there and the collapsed wall.
And we'd like, I guess, a photo pan around this remarkable core hole.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Come on; bring it on over here, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, bring it on over here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Joe, just stand by until we get this settled down, and then we'll come at you for what is the next task.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (To Joe) You're going to have to just hold off on jumping ahead of us, because we always have to come back and ask you what you said anyway.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...Jim, if I could get you to help me take the treadle off.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: So, if you'll get on the other side, we can jiggle it and move it up towards the drill.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You can't put any up or down on it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) It's locked on there, isn't it?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) I tell you, we'll do it section by...If you could hold it up there, Jim.
Hold it on the Hand Tool Carrier.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Let me get on the other end.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: You just twist the drill off.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Keep it straight if you can.
Ought to break in a little bit, here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I got to take my camera off.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You want me to stand by here, Dave?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Just hold on while I...(Long Pause)
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Get the) handy dandy caps out of here.
Well, listen, I can get it from there, I think, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; well I'm going to take these pictures that Joe requested.
And if you need any help, just holler, and I'll be right back.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: On the drill top end goes (core cap) Alfa.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I have the photos of the trench.
Did you say you wanted a pan from this location, Joe?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Golly, there's some stuff in there!
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: On the (bottom of the) top section goes (cap) Charlie.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: which are going to have to go in here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Going to grab your camera, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: That's the one that jammed yesterday, isn't it?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: It was working there for a while, and then it jammed again.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Hey, Joe, what bag do you want these core stems to go in.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Bag number 2 doesn't have any pockets.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) There will be a problem when we start working in the bag.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: That's an extra bag now, and we'll keep that in mind.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Delta is the cap on top of the next section.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Long Pause) Jim, did you get the vise on right?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Can only go on one way, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: You have a new mag on there today, Jim.
It couldn't have been the one that failed yesterday.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: No, I had the color mag on there, TT.
That's the one that was on there yesterday.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Tango Tango is a brand new mag.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I'll throw a little malfunction procedure on it (meaning the Hasselblad) then.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I hate to tell you, Jim, but that...Oh boy!
This vise is on...I swear it's on backwards.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: The holes on the Hand Tool Carrier only line up one way.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (To Houston) How many hours you want to spend on this drill, Joe?
(Laughs) Like the vise doesn't bite strong enough to get a grip so I can break the sections.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, if you want, I can get on the other end and hold it steady.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...(and) see if it does any good.
But the training ones hold good.
There's never any problem with them.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Let me get on the other end.
Some caps behind your left boot.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think we're about through with this.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Hold it straight in the vise, if you can, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, the treadle may be jammed against the fender.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Pause) (Delighted as the stem breaks free even more noticeably) There!!
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (I'll) get it out here a little ways.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Joe, I haven't heard you say yet you really want this that bad.
(Pause) Tell me you really want it this bad.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (With a touch of wistful sympathy in his voice) It's hard for me to say, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I'll get those caps for you, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Perhaps putting the caps in the SCB) Okay.
(To Jim) Now, old buddy, if you think you can have some luck taking that (treadle) off.
I'll tell you what, we got to break it again.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, how many more sections to come apart?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: If you can get the wrench, I'll hold the treadle.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (To Joe, with clear annoyance) Oh, stand by, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, I've got it there if you can...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Long Pause) That doesn't look right either.
Man, how did that treadle get like that?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: See if I can get it out.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Work it out towards you, because of the cap.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Take that...The end of your right hand should come through, while I work on the rest of them, here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: If I had known (about) this, I would have left my cover gloves on, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Well, don't mess with it then.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Long Pause) The vise doesn't work, at all!
(To Jim) I'll have to have you hold it, the...(Pause as Dave glances at the watch on his left wrist) How about that: an hour and 15 minutes into it (meaning the EVA) already.
We're still fiddling with this thing.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Now, hold that section for me...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave and Jim, this is Houston.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Under Joe) Try to bring that back that way, Dave?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Do you think you can turn off the bottom-most drill section?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Joe, you can see on the TV.
Now, the vise...(correcting himself) My hand wrench works okay.
The one on the back of the Hand Tool Carrier doesn't seem to want to work for some reason.
It may just be because of the threads on the stems.
I just can't get them broken apart!
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave and Jim, put that section on the ground, if you would, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We'll pick it up on the way back.
And we want you to continue on with the Grand Prix.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We might be able to return it (to Earth) just like that.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I don't know where we're going to put it in the Command Module.
(Looking around) Let me put it someplace where we don't ding it.
There's no place to put it.
I'll lay it right here on the treadle.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I guess we ought to take it back (to Earth).
There's more time invested in that than anything we've done.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We don't want the drill on here.
What do you want to do with the drill?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Put it on the surface here?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Why don't you check it out and see if it runs?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I checked it out at 1 foot per second earlier.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I'll give it a short burst here.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) Dave, while you're climbing on the Rover, we'll take...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: The meter readouts and your heading is 292.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Joe, I never did any systems reset, but they were all sitting zero when I stopped here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Looking at EVA-2 CDR-20) The Sun should be over your right shoulder, so why don't you take a right turn there.
You should be 45 degrees, looking up towards Schaber Hill over there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You want to do a quick turn there so you don't get dust on my experiments.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: If you want, you can do a left turn there, Dave.
And I'll move back a little more.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: If I can get my seatbelt on.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, before you move out, you want to double-check your heading at 292.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Pause) Got a long way to go.
(Pause) Make this torquing switch a set-and-hold switch, instead of spring loaded, would help!
(Pause) Be with you in a minute, Jim.
I've got to torque another 90 degrees or so.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'm looking to find out where all the big rocks are.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And tell Dave once again that you don't want any dust on your experiments.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Hey, Joe, you never did tell me that drill was that important.
Just tell me that it's , and then I'll feel a lot better.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Because then I don't feel like I wasted so much time.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Quite seriously, Dave and Jim, that's undoubtedly the deepest sample we'll have out of the Moon for perhaps as long as the Moon itself has been there.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And, Jim, I'll take a left turn out of here.
(Pause) Making sure I don't get any dust on your experiments.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Wait, let me get over here and get set up.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Let me move back a little bit then.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: The Sun's over your right shoulder.
Take a little left turn there.
I'll start up and go constant, if you are ready.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'm going to make a right turn.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You kicked up a very nice rooster tail.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) And I'll come back across, and give you a hard stop If I can find us a smooth spot to get going here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: How does that camera seem to be working?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: It feels like it's working, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: The indicator is still at full.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: No, let's do it later; because I'd have to get off and get unstrapped and everything else to get to the seatpan.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (To Houston) I still indicate full, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let's take a good, clean comfortable look at that rille.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Yeah, that's a good idea, Joe.
Best idea you've had all morning.
I don't know what's wrong with this camera.
I checked all the film again and ran it through with my finger a few times and made sure that the perforations were right on the red mark.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Sounds like you followed the owner's manual.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Uh oh; just stay right there.
Got to get off and get over and get your seatbelt.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, while Jim is climbing on there, could you get us some Rover readouts, please?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I'll give those to you, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: You're going to have to get off.
(Long Pause) Okay, give me that extension handle, now.
(Long Pause) Okay, now, why don't you try hopping up here again?
Want me to hold the camera for you?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Don't lean so far back when you get on, Jim.
That's what's happening; you get your...Let your PLSS down a little bit.
